# WebScraper

> Fetches content from a URL and extracts text from HTML. Includes rate limiting (10 requests/minute) and timeout protection.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | web |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| url | string | yes | - | URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://) |
| extract_text | boolean | no | true | Whether to extract text from HTML (default: true) |
| timeout | integer | no | 30 | Request timeout in seconds (default: 30) |
| user_agent | string | no | - | Custom User-Agent header (optional) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "WebScraper"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
